text.title: Auto-Evict Tool Results Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to wire auto-eviction into an agent runtime.

step.name: wire-middleware
step.input: Tool runtime (e.g. LangChain Deep Agents, custom decorator).
step.action: Wrap tool execution: after the tool returns, count tokens, decide evict y/n.
step.output: Decorator installed; emits structured log on every eviction.

step.name: add-scratch-storage
step.action: On eviction, write full payload to `{scratch_path}/{tool_call_id}.txt`.

step.name: expose-read-tool
step.action: Add `read_file(path, lines)` tool with a small allowed-paths whitelist (no path escape).

step.name: smoke-test
step.action: Run the agent end-to-end; verify pointer was emitted and read tool successfully fetched lines.

step.name: tune-N-and-ship
step.action: Compute tool-result size distribution; adjust threshold to 90th percentile if too aggressive.
